mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate applied to equity cash flows, mechanically lifting present valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals an approaching labor market peak and economic contraction, triggering risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns within the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike, or the signal shows no predictive power over a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer credit balances combined with increasing housing starts indicate synchronized household spending and construction activity, which drives corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark in at least 3 consecutive rolling quarters, or the interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: An expanding industrial production index reflects recovering manufacturing capacity and easing supply bottlenecks, which compresses input costs and supports equity valuations over a one-month forward window.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain flat or negative when INDPRO prints above its 12-month moving average, or the signal's information ratio drops below 0.5 over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation readings remain elevated above 230 while the federal funds rate stays below 0.25 percent, real rates turn deeply negative, forcing capital into nominal assets and generating strong positive S&P 500 forward returns over a weekly horizon.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative forward returns in more than 50% of occurrences, or the cross-sectional predictive power vanishes when controlling for VIX levels.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls demonstrates underlying economic resilience, sustaining corporate revenue trajectories and yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over a three-month horizon.
failure_condition: The rolling 12-month correlation between PAYEMS growth and SPX forward returns falls below 0.10, or the strategy incurs a maximum drawdown exceeding 15% without recovery within 6 months.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between slowing real GDP growth and persistently high consumer price levels indicates stagflationary pressure, which erodes profit margins and triggers negative S&P 500 forward returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly lower during periods of negative GDP growth combined with CPI above 230, or the signal's Sharpe ratio remains positive over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in housing starts below 850 thousand units signals collapsing builder confidence and household wealth effects, which reduces aggregate demand and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns within the next week.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict downward price movement in at least 4 out of 5 triggered episodes, or forward returns show no statistical difference from random walk benchmarks (p > 0.05).
